# Prem Gautam

Prem Gautam, also known online as pray3m, is a full-stack engineer from Nepal.

Website: https://premgautam.me
GitHub: https://github.com/pray3m
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pray3m/
X: https://twitter.com/pray3m_
Instagram: https://instagram.com/pray3m

Focus: full-stack engineering, SaaS products, AI-assisted products, Next.js, Node.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Docker, production web systems.

Key pages:
- About: https://premgautam.me/about
- Projects: https://premgautam.me/projects
- Contact: https://premgautam.me/contact

Selected projects:
- Pikeah: multi-tenant LinkedIn outreach SaaS with dashboard, API, browser extension, unified inbox, team permissions, and campaign automation.
- Maison & Architecture: public, admin, and partner experiences for an architecture and construction platform.
- Cro-scan: AI website-conversion auditor for prioritized landing-page improvements.
- ZyFlow: no-code web-scraping SaaS with workflow builder, scheduling, billing, and AI-assisted field detection.
